headline: Bitcoin Price Spikes As Trump Delays Strikes Against Iran
summary: President Donald Trump pauses strikes against Iranian energy infrastructure for five days. Bitcoin price rallies. Gold, oil futures fall.

raw.headline: Bitcoin Price Spikes As Trump Delays Strikes Against Iran
raw.summary: President Donald Trump pauses strikes against Iranian energy infrastructure for five days. Bitcoin price rallies. Gold, oil futures fall.

headline: Bitcoin Jumps 3% After Trump Announces 5-Day Iran Energy Infrastructure Strike Pause
summary: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is up 3% over the past 24 hours after President Trump announced a 5-day postponement of attacks on Iranian energy infrastructure

headline: Bitmine Immersion Technologies Announces As Of March 22, The Company's Crypto Holdings Are Comprised Of 4,660,903 ETH, 196 Bitcoin, $200M Stake In Beast Industries, $95M Stake In Eightco Holdings And Total Cash Of $1.1B
summary: (NYSE AMERICAN: BMNR) Bitmine Immersion Technologies, Inc. ("Bitmine" or the "Company") a Bitcoin and Ethereum Network company with a focus on the accumulation of crypto for long term investment, today announced
